title: serruria roxburghii
intro: Serruria roxburghii, also known as the King's lily or Roxburgh's heath, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Serruria roxburghii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
